patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 7 (bullpen-gap disadvantage) is losing predictive power on marginal gaps (<0.02 xwOBA): 3 straight false negatives in the last 10 days (KC@BAL 7/10 +0.018 won, KC@BAL 7/12 +0.019 won, MIA@MIL 7/18 +0.0185 won on a grade-A score-5 stack). Applied pushback today only on CHW@TEX (gap +0.0077, otherwise clean A-grade stack with deGrom reducing bullpen exposure); did NOT extend the pushback to STL@LAA (same marginal gap) because it also carries a bullpen_fatigue flag and confidence_downgrade, and left MIN@CLE alone (gap +0.0242, a genuinely large gap the cap still validates on).

3 of today's 7 GOLD-tier picks (SF@KC, NYM@MIL, WSH@COL) were guardrail-demoted from PLATINUM for rolling win rate below benchmark. Archive PLATINUM hit rate is ~43% -- all three downgraded to SKIP today rather than trusted at face value.

F1_xera_gap* (starred/thin-sample SP signal) without an independent F3>=1000 corroborator has lost 3 straight recent GOLD confirms (SEA@TB 7/12, LAD@NYY and CHW@TOR both 7/17). WSH@COL matches this exact pattern (F1* backed only by F2/F5, no F3) and was downgraded partly on that basis; BAL@BOS was kept at GOLD because its F1* IS independently corroborated by both SP-edge and PQI.

OAK@ARI shows a negative edge (-3.17pp) on a GOLD-tier pick that did not collapse to score=1 as HARD CAP 1 specifies (it graded out at score=2/B) -- flagged as a likely pipeline bypass per the standing heuristic that any negative-edge GOLD reaching Claude uncapped signals a code-path issue, and downgraded manually.

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: The +0.26pp edge is already far outside the staking band. HARD CAP 7 fires cleanly here (bullpen gap +0.0242, well above the ~0.02 threshold where the cap has recently misfired) and HARD CAP 10 catches the bottom-bucket pick_prob (0.534). No live news changes the picture. SKIP confirmed.

PIT @ NYY.reasoning: D-grade with SP xERA and PQI both against the NYY pick and no F-signal support. The archive shows dual-opposing-signal D grades run roughly 50/50 directionally, so this isn't a fade-worthy edge toward Pittsburgh either -- just a weak pick. SKIP confirmed.

TB @ TOR.reasoning: Cease's F5 dominance (0.938) evaporates by full game (0.552) -- a 38.6pp Stage1/2 split, the largest on the slate, meaning a late-leverage thesis is carrying the number and doesn't hold at full-game level. Negative edge (-5.16pp) also triggers HARD CAP 1 and bottom-bucket HARD CAP 10. SKIP confirmed.

BAL @ BOS.reasoning: Cleanest stack on the slate: SP edge (+1.34 xERA) and PQI (+24.2) both confirm Boston, Stage 1/2 agree tightly (delta 0.06), and the bullpen gap favors BOS (-0.0011). The F1* signal is thin-sample but independently corroborated by SP-edge and PQI, satisfying the corroboration bar that recent F1*-alone losers failed to clear. GOLD confirmed.

LAD @ PHI.reasoning: D grade: SP edge (-2) and PQI (-1) both oppose the LAD pick despite a modest team_quality boost. No qualitative signal (injury, weather, lineup) overrides two negative quant signals here. SKIP confirmed.

SD @ ATL.reasoning: Negative edge (-8.31pp), PQI against the pick, and a bottom-bucket pick_prob (0.534) all stack against Atlanta. No live news contradicts. SKIP confirmed.

SF @ KC.reasoning: Already demoted from PLATINUM by the rolling-win-rate guardrail (archive PLATINUM hit rate is ~43%), and pick_prob (0.545) sits in the bottom bucket where even CONFIRM-rescued picks hit only 47.6% historically -- below breakeven. Add a 26.75pp Stage1/2 split (F5 0.706 vs full 0.438) suggesting an unconfirmed bullpen thesis. Downgrading to SKIP.

NYM @ MIL.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 already collapsed this from a PLATINUM-quality stack (pre-cap score 4) to score 1 on the -3.19pp negative edge. It also carries an acute_roster stress warning I can't independently verify (no live roster news accessible) plus confidence_downgrade=True. Too many stacked cautions to trust despite the otherwise strong SP-edge/PQI stack. Downgrading to SKIP.

DET @ CHC.reasoning: D grade, SP edge and PQI both against the Cubs pick. Straightforward SKIP, no overriding context found.

CHW @ TEX.reasoning: Pre-cap this is a clean A (score 5): SP edge, PQI, Stage1/2 agreement, and an F-signal all confirm Texas, with deGrom starting -- an innings-eater who reduces exposure to the bullpen gap the cap penalizes. HARD CAP 7 fired only on a marginal +0.0077 gap, the same magnitude that's produced 3 straight false negatives in the last 10 days. Keeping GOLD; the raw edge (0.89pp) is too small to stake either way regardless.

MIA @ HOU.reasoning: Ronel Blanco shows 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date (sp_savant_gate=HARD_VETO), almost certainly a rehab/return start, which makes the SP-edge feature unusable -- functionally the same blindspot as an unproven rookie SP. Bottom-bucket pick_prob (0.533) adds HARD CAP 10 on top. SKIP confirmed; would want a live scouting look at Blanco's stuff before trusting either side.

WSH @ COL.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 (-1.72pp edge) and HARD CAP 10 (bottom-bucket 0.537) both fire, and this is a second PLATINUM-demoted-to-GOLD pick today. Its F1* signal lacks F3>=1000 corroboration (only F2/F5 support it) -- the exact pattern that lost 3 straight recent GOLD confirms. Downgrading to SKIP.

OAK @ ARI.reasoning: Edge is negative (-3.17pp) on a GOLD-tier pick, which per HARD CAP 1 should collapse to score 1 (B-), but this row shows score 2 (B) -- a likely process bypass matching the standing heuristic on unbypassed negative-edge GOLDs. Also carries a large 20.9pp Stage1/2 split and a bullpen_fatigue stress warning. Manually downgrading to SKIP.

CIN @ SEA.reasoning: Worst grade on the slate (D, score -4): SP edge and PQI both oppose Cincinnati, and fair_prob (0.397) fails the 0.42 floor outright. Clean SKIP, no fade justified per the archive's dual-opposing-signal caution.

STL @ LAA.reasoning: Pre-cap this looked like the slate's other A (score 5), but HARD CAP 7 fires on a marginal +0.0079 bullpen gap -- the same small magnitude that's recently false-negatived elsewhere. Unlike CHW@TEX, this pick also carries a bullpen_fatigue flag (archive: co-occurs with correctly-suppressed picks) and confidence_downgrade=True, plus a 15.06pp edge sitting right at the outer edge of the acceptable band. Too many stacked cautions to keep GOLD. Downgrading to SKIP.
